summary: Comprehensive testing of ProfitPilot Iteration 7 features completed: Currency Conversion (Exchange Rates API), Admin Panel (Stats + User Management), Onboarding Flow (5-step walkthrough), and Email Notifications (Preferences + Test Email). All backend APIs pass 100% (13/13 tests). All frontend UI tests pass 100%.
passed_tests: Backend: Login API returns token (200)
Backend: GET /api/exchange-rates returns success:true with rates object containing USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, etc.
Backend: GET /api/exchange-rates/convert?amount=100&from_currency=EUR&to_currency=USD returns converted amount
Backend: GET /api/exchange-rates/convert?amount=50&from_currency=USD&to_currency=GBP returns converted amount
Backend: Same currency conversion (USD to USD) returns same amount with rate 1.0
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats returns totalUsers, totalTransactions, totalInvoices, platformRevenue (admin only)
Backend: GET /api/admin/users returns list of users with id, name, email, role, transactionCount (admin only)
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats without token returns 401 Unauthorized
Backend: GET /api/admin/users without token returns 401 Unauthorized
Backend: GET /api/notifications/preferences returns emailNotifications, weeklyReports, overdueReminders, transactionAlerts
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/preferences updates preferences and persists changes
Backend: POST /api/notifications/send-test returns response (success:false with config message expected without RESEND_API_KEY)
Backend: GET /api/notifications/preferences without token returns 401 Unauthorized
Frontend: Onboarding overlay shows on first visit to dashboard (data-testid='onboarding-overlay')
Frontend: Onboarding has 5 steps with titles: Track Your Finances, Manage Invoices & Clients, Powerful Reports & Charts, Tax Calculator & Multi-Currency, AI-Powered Insights
Frontend: Onboarding has Back, Next, Skip, and Finish buttons with proper data-testid attributes
Frontend: Onboarding can be dismissed and sets localStorage 'profitpilot_onboarding_complete' to 'true'
Frontend: Admin Panel page loads with data-testid='admin-page'
Frontend: Admin Panel shows 6 stats cards (Total Users: 7, Total Transactions: 24, Total Invoices: 4, Platform Revenue, Platform Expenses, Net Profit)
Frontend: Admin Panel shows User Management list with 7 users and role selectors (data-testid='admin-user-list')
Frontend: Settings page has Email Notifications section (data-testid='notification-settings')
Frontend: Settings has 4 notification toggles: Email Notifications (master), Transaction Alerts, Weekly Reports, Overdue Reminders
Frontend: Settings has 'Save Preferences' button (data-testid='save-notifications-btn')
Frontend: Settings has 'Send Test Email' button (data-testid='send-test-email-btn')
Frontend: Transactions page shows currency selector in form (data-testid='transaction-currency-select')
Frontend: Currency selector dropdown shows 10 currencies: USD, EUR, GBP, CAD, AUD, INR, JPY, AED, SGD, CHF
Frontend: Tax Calculator page loads with country selector (data-testid='country-select')
Frontend: Tax Calculator shows US tax brackets and calculates taxes correctly
seed_data_creation: No test data created - all tests used existing demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Four new features fully tested and working: 1) Currency Conversion - Exchange rates API using frankfurter.app (free, no key needed), /api/exchange-rates returns rates object, /api/exchange-rates/convert handles currency conversion. Frontend shows currency selector in transaction form with 10 currencies. 2) Admin Panel - /api/admin/stats and /api/admin/users endpoints require admin role (demo@profitpilot.com is admin). Frontend shows stats cards and user management with role selectors. 3) Onboarding Flow - Pure frontend with localStorage key 'profitpilot_onboarding_complete'. 5 steps covering all app features. 4) Email Notifications - /api/notifications/preferences for CRUD, /api/notifications/send-test for test email. RESEND_API_KEY not configured so send-test returns success:false with config message (expected behavior). All data-testid attributes properly implemented.

mocked_apis.Email Notifications via Resend: RESEND_API_KEY not configured - send-test endpoint returns success:false with 'Email service not configured' message, which is expected behavior in testing mode
